name: Comprehensive Test Suite for Hare Platform
description: Complete test suite covering all features using Vitest unit/integration tests and Playwright E2E tests for authentication, dashboard, agents, tools, settings, webhooks, workspaces, real-time WebSocket features, and accessibility compliance

userStories.title: Create test fixtures and factories
userStories.description: As a developer, I want comprehensive test fixtures and data factories so that tests have consistent, reusable test data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/testing package with shared test utilities
Create factory functions for all core entities: createTestUser(), createTestAgent(), createTestTool(), createTestWorkspace(), createTestWebhook()
Each factory accepts optional overrides for customization
Create database seeding utilities for integration tests
Create mock builders for Cloudflare bindings (D1, KV, R2, AI)
Export all fixtures from a central @hare/testing package
Add documentation for fixture usage in README
bun run checks passes
bun run test passes

userStories.title: Unit tests for authentication API routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for all authentication API routes so that auth flows are verified at the API level.
acceptanceCriteria: Test POST /api/auth/sign-up/email - successful registration
Test POST /api/auth/sign-up/email - duplicate email rejection
Test POST /api/auth/sign-up/email - invalid email format rejection
Test POST /api/auth/sign-up/email - weak password rejection
Test POST /api/auth/sign-in/email - successful login returns session
Test POST /api/auth/sign-in/email - invalid credentials return 401
Test GET /api/auth/session - returns session for authenticated user
Test GET /api/auth/session - returns null/401 for unauthenticated
Test POST /api/auth/sign-out - clears session
Test GET /api/auth/providers - returns available OAuth providers
All tests use mocked D1 database
Tests located in packages/api/src/routes/__tests__/auth.test.ts
bun run checks passes
bun run test passes
